home.title: Extract your content instantly
home.subtitle: The fastest direct download engine. Paste a link, choose format, and enjoy your file instantly, without complications or download managers.
home.waiting: Content information will appear here once you enter a valid link.

auth.loginDesc: Enter VeloStream. Download fast, directly and clean, keeping only your final files on your device.
auth.registerDesc: Join VeloStream. Turn any link into the file you need in seconds.
auth.acceptTerms: I have read and accept the Legal Disclaimer.
auth.termsError: You must accept the legal terms to continue.

help.title: Help & Support
help.desc: Everything you need to know to download content fast and hassle-free.
help.q1: How do I download a video?
help.a1: Just copy the video link, paste it into the home input, select the format (MP4 or MP3) and click Extract.
help.q2: Do I have to install anything?
help.a2: Nope. VeloStream works entirely in your browser. We do the heavy lifting, you receive a clean file.
help.q3: Does this site manage my downloads or keep my history?
help.a3: No. Our philosophy is simple: you enter, download your file, and leave. We are not a manager and we don't keep libraries of your activity.

legal.title: Legal Disclaimer
legal.desc: Please read this warning before using the tool.
legal.body1: VeloStream is a service designed exclusively for downloading public or public domain content for personal use, research or fair use.
legal.body2: We do not host, store, or distribute copyrighted files. All processing is done in real time and the file is delivered to your machine at your own risk.
legal.body3: By using our engine, you agree not to infringe third-party copyrights. The end user assumes full responsibility for the audiovisual material generated through our tools.
legal.dmcaDesc: If you represent copyright owners and believe our tool is being used to demonstrably infringe on your content, you can contact us:
